hypothesis: Augmenting the Δ-learning model with quantitative ligand-field descriptors of the metal nodes (coordination number, octahedral/tetrahedral symmetry metrics, and metal–ligand bond-length/angle variances) will reduce the HSE06 band-gap mean absolute error for MOFs containing Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, or Ni by at least 25% relative to the Δ-learning model trained on ST-135, RACs
